decision.summary: No new action: reconciliation is broken at the day rollover because the Apr 21 77k reach is missing its closure record.
decision.rationale: At 2026-04-22 00:00 UTC the only live active thesis position is the weekly 72k dip, but reconciliation is explicitly broken with the issue 'missing closure record for will-bitcoin-reach-77k-on-april-21:Yes'. Under the playbook, reconciliation is a hard gate for any new entry, so even if a fresh daily slate is about to open, the correct action is NO_ACTION until the state is coherent again. Binance spot is 76365.99, the weekly bearish thesis is still alive, no open position is near the 90-95% take-profit zone, and there is no valid management action to take on the remaining weekly. The correct action is to hold the weekly position and avoid any new opening while accounting is inconsistent.
